creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
I created another patch [1] which in addition to your patch:
- adds stage directory support (removed NO_STAGE and patching of
CMakeLists.txt when the DOCS option is off)
- does not set the BINDGEN option on by default since the rest builds
fine on FreeBSD 10.0+ (OPTIONS_DEFAULT cannot be set after
bsd.port.pre.mk is included)
- unconditionally depends on lang/clang32 to build (fails otherwise)
- simplifies include files and option handling
- removes indefinite leading article ('A ') from COMMENT

[1] http://people.freebsd.org/~rene/patches/lang__clay.diff
(full patch against version in Ports Tree)

René
